this code appears in the dosage form code description variable (called 
GCDF_DESC). In the Formulary file, this variable is populated by matching the drug products on the 
Part D Plan submitted formulary to FDB. Part D plan sponsors submit the formulary to the CMS Health 
Plan Management System (HPMS). Plans identify the drug products on their formularies using the 
National Library of Medicine RxNorm Concept Unique Identifiers (RXCUIs). Each RXCUI corresponds to 
a unique brand name and
